Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petitions to Approve the Compromises of Disputed Claims of two Minors.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Giselle Casey, #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768.

Laura Flynn, Esq. appeared with petitioner Truc Lam, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Harrison Ng & Richard Ng, who were not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and but did not testify.
Court Certified Vietnamese speaking interpreter Ha Thi To assisted Ms. Lam at today's hearing.
Order waiving the minors' appearances at today's hearing was filed on September 15, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petitions are granted and the compromises are approved as follows:

Minor Harrison Ng

Settlement Amount - $10,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,842.69.
Costs - $2,629.26.

The net balance of $5,528.05 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Citi Bank, located at 4638 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94112. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Minor Richard Ng

Settlement Amount - $10,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,842.69.
Costs - $2,629.26.

The net balance of $5,528.05 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Citi Bank, located at 4638 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94112. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED as to both minors to November 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 14 for Progress Report on the Status of filing the receipt & acknowledgment of money deposited into a blocked account.
